headers.value: default-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.firebase.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
